name: Qwen3-235B-A22B (Thinking)
archDisplay: MoE Transformer (128 experts, 8 active, hybrid thinking mode)
note: Gen-3 flagship MoE, thinking-mode setting; rivals DeepSeek-R1, o1, Gemini 2.5 Pro.
tpsNote: Exceeds single RTX 4090 24GB VRAM even at Q4 (~132GB); requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.

results.notes: MMLU-Redux, Thinking mode, Qwen3 Technical Report Table 11
C-Eval, Thinking mode, Table 11. Slightly above the taxonomy's stated 20-88 range but confirmed exact in the primary source.
Arena-Hard (first-gen, distinct from Arena-Hard v2), Thinking mode, Table 11
CodeForces rating (Elo), Thinking mode, Table 11; corresponding percentile given as 98.2%. Elo rating, not a 0-100 score.
MMMLU across 14 languages, Thinking mode, Table 11

Third-party Scale AI SWE-Bench Pro public leaderboard result, surfaced via the HF model card's community 'Eval Results' widget (unverified badge, PR-submitted by a HF community member, not by Qwen). This is an independent/aggregator result, not a Qwen self-report.

Humanity's Last Exam, independently evaluated by Artificial Analysis on their 'Qwen3 235B A22B (Reasoning)' page, explicitly labeled 'Released April 2025' -- this is the original checkpoint this file tracks, distinct from the separately-cataloged Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 update (which has its own corpus entry at qwen3-235b-a22b-thinking-2507.json). Read via live browser render since the page is JS-rendered. No hle slug was previously present in this file. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 8 -> 12]

IFBench, independently evaluated by Artificial Analysis on the original (April 2025, non-2507) 'Qwen3 235B A22B (Reasoning)' page. Distinct from the self-reported IFEval (83.4) already tracked. No ifbench slug was previously present.

Aider Polyglot coding benchmark, independent third-party eval by the Aider project (not a Qwen self-report). Row labeled 'Qwen3 235B A22B diff on OpenRouter, all providers, default settings (thinking)' -- confirmed via raw HTML fetch (curl) that this is the only thinking/reasoning-mode-enabled row for this model in the post; all other configurations tested explicitly disabled thinking (/no_think). Matches this file's original April 2025 thinking-mode checkpoint. No aider-polyglot slug was previously present in this file.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF model card (235B total/22B active, 128 experts/8 active per token, Apache 2.0, native 32,768 tokens extendable to 131,072/128K via YaRN) and qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen3 (release date 2025-04-29). Read Table 11 of arxiv.org/pdf/2505.09388 directly: AIME'24=85.7, LiveCodeBench v5=70.7, GPQA-Diamond=71.1, BFCL v3=70.8 all match exactly; HF page confirmed MMLU-Pro=68.18 verbatim. No changes.
